D12 PsychologyL3 ApplyReference

CTA Button A/B — Colour Contrast Wins

HubSpot famous case: red CTA outperformed green +21% — but the lesson was contrast against the page, not "red converts"; the green page made the red button stand out

A/B tests on button colour show small but reproducible gains (5–25%) when colour contrast against the page increases. The "isolation effect" (von Restorff): unique stimuli are remembered better. Modern designers use complement to brand colour, not "red" as a universal rule.

Slide button hue; conversion-rate model based on page-button contrast.
